test_sufficiency_summary: GUI smoke coverage passes for the registered parent-backed WXTacticalUI flow, but the direct TacticalDamageSummaryGUI and ICM interaction checks are currently unregistered dead code.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md is mostly accurate but overstates live ICM-selection smoke coverage.
tests_run: cd tests/gui && if [ -n "$DISPLAY" ]; then make -j2 >/dev/null && ./GuiTests; elif command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then make -j2 >/dev/null && xvfb-run -a ./GuiTests; else make -j2 >/dev/null && ./GuiTests; fi
